# PERF-216 negative: pooled struct reuse
lang: go
file: PERF-216-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "sync"

type TreeNode struct {
	A int
	B int
	C int
}

var nodePool = sync.Pool{
	New: func() any { return &TreeNode{} },
}

func Build(items []int) []*TreeNode {
	out := make([]*TreeNode, 0, len(items))
	for i := range items {
		node := nodePool.Get().(*TreeNode)
		node.A, node.B, node.C = i, i+1, i+2
		out = append(out, node)
	}
	return out
}
